member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Plugin
member.summary: StashSync plugin for Jellyfin. Maps Stash App Groups → Jellyfin Movies via .strm files.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the current plugin instance.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration for StashSync.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StashUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the base URL of the Stash instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:9999).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StashApiKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the Stash API key (if authentication is enabled in Stash).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.TmdbApiKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the TMDB API key (v3 auth) used to fetch poster URLs. Free to obtain at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StrmOutputPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the local filesystem path where .strm files will be written. Jellyfin must have this path added as a Movie library.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.UseStreamUrls
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use Stash stream URLs (true) or local file paths (false) inside the .strm files. Stream URLs are more network-friendly for cross-machine setups.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.MinSceneCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum number of scenes required for a Group to be synced. Groups with fewer scenes than this will be skipped.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.IncludeGroupsWithoutCover
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to include Groups that have no cover image.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ProxyUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the base URL of the StashProxy service (e.g. http://192.168.0.38:5678). When set, .strm files will point to the proxy which streams all scenes concatenated. Leave empty to use direct Stash stream URLs (single scene only).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.PluginServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers all StashSync services with Jellyfin's DI container.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.StashApiClient
member.summary: Lightweight GraphQL client for the Stash API.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.StashApiClient.GetAllGroupsAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches all Groups from Stash, page by page.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.StashApiClient.TestConnectionAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tries to contact Stash and returns true if the connection succeeds.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.StashApiClient.EnrichSceneOrder(Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.StashGroup)
member.summary: Reads the scene_index from the nested groups[].scene_index field and stamps it onto each scene so we can sort correctly later.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.GraphQLRequest
member.summary: Raw GraphQL request envelope.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.StashScene.OrderIndex
member.summary: Order index within the group (populated from GroupScene.scene_index).

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.StashQueries.FindGroupScenes
member.summary: Query to get a single group's scenes with their order index.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Providers.StashExternalId
member.summary: Registers "Stash" as an external ID type in Jellyfin. This allows the Group ID to be displayed and linked on the movie's detail page.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Providers.StashGroupMetadataProvider
member.summary: Metadata provider for StashSync .strm movie entries. Sets the Stash Group external ID so the movie links back to Stash. Chapters are embedded directly in the .nfo file and handled by Jellyfin's built-in NFO reader.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Providers.StashGroupMetadataProvider.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Providers.StashGroupMetadataProvider})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Tasks.StrmWriter
member.summary:
Writes .strm + .nfo sidecar pairs for each Stash Group.
Output layout: {StrmOutputPath}/ {GroupName} (StashGroup-{id})/ {GroupName}.strm ← streams the FIRST scene (Jellyfin's anchor file) {GroupName}.nfo ← movie metadata for Jellyfin chapter-metadata.xml ← chapter list used by the metadata provider poster.jpg ← cover art (TMDB preferred, Stash fallback)

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Tasks.StrmWriter.WriteGroupAsync(Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.StashGroup,Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates/updates the folder and files for a single Group. Returns true if anything was written.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Tasks.StrmWriter.CleanupOrphanedGroups(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.StashGroup},Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Removes folders for groups that no longer exist in Stash.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Tasks.StrmWriter.WriteM3U8Playlist(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.GraphQL.StashScene,System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Writes an M3U8 playlist file listing all scene stream URLs in order. Jellyfin reads this and plays each scene sequentially.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Tasks.StrmWriter.FetchTmdbImagesAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Calls the TMDB API to get poster and backdrop paths for a movie.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Tasks.StrmWriter.ExtractTmdbId(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a TMDB movie ID from a URL like https://www.themoviedb.org/movie/12345

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Tasks.StrmWriter.DownloadImageAsync(System.String,Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Configuration.PluginConfiguration,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads an image to disk. Pass null for config when the URL is already absolute (e.g. TMDB).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Tasks.StrmWriter.TmdbImages
member.summary: Holds poster and backdrop paths returned from the TMDB API.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Tasks.StrmWriter.TmdbImages.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Holds poster and backdrop paths returned from the TMDB API.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.StashSync.Tasks.SyncStashGroupsTask
member.summary: Jellyfin scheduled task: "Sync Stash Groups". Triggered manually from Administration → Scheduled Tasks.
